titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا غَيْرَةَ فِي الْحَلَال‏
titles.en: 178. No Vigilance and Protectionism against Lawful Matters

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا غَيْرَةَ فِي الْحَلَال‏
titles.en: 178. No Vigilance and Protectionism against Lawful Matters

segments: لا غَيْرَةَ فِي الْحَلالِ بَعْدَ قَوْلِ رَسُولِ اللهِ (صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِه) لا تُحَدِّثَا شَيْئاً حَتَّى أَرْجِعَ إِلَيْكُمَا فَلَمَّا أَتَاهُمَا أَدْخَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ بَيْنَهُمَا فِي الْفِرَاشِ.
arabic.text: لا غَيْرَةَ فِي الْحَلالِ بَعْدَ قَوْلِ رَسُولِ اللهِ (صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِه) لا تُحَدِّثَا شَيْئاً حَتَّى أَرْجِعَ إِلَيْكُمَا فَلَمَّا أَتَاهُمَا أَدْخَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ بَيْنَهُمَا فِي الْفِرَاشِ.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Vigilance and protectionism is not needed against lawful matters, in the light of the words of the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, “The two of you (Ali and Fatimah, Alayhim al-Salam ,) you must not do anything until I come back to you” and when he (the Messenger of Allah) came back he stretched his legs between them in the furnishing.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Vigilance and protectionism is not needed against lawful matters, in the light of the words of the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, “The two of you (Ali and Fatimah, Alayhim al-Salam ,) you must not do anything until I come back to you” and when he (the Messenger of Allah) came back he stretched his legs between them in the furnishing.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/379)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/379)

narratorChain.raw: 1- عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ جَمِيلِ بْنِ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللهِ (عَلَيْهِ السَّلام) قَالَ
